evals.prompt: Create a GitHub pull request template for our repository. It should include sections for type of change, testing instructions, and a checklist.
expectations: Includes a 'Type of change' section with checkboxes
Includes a 'How to test' section with clear steps
Includes a 'Checklist' for the author (e.g., self-review, linting passed)

evals.prompt: Help me write a PR description. I just added a new Redis caching layer to the user profile endpoint to speed up load times. I also added unit tests for the cache hit/miss logic.
evals.expected_output: A filled-in PR description based on the provided context.
expectations: Summarizes the addition of Redis caching to the profile endpoint
Explains the 'Why' (to speed up load times)
Lists the changes (added caching logic, added unit tests)
Provides instructions on how a reviewer can test the cache hit/miss behavior locally
